name: Consistent Reader
description: Visit the site 3 days in a row.

name: Historian
description: Visit every tab in the Bible Context Explorer.

name: Night Owl

description: Ask the AI Bible assistant a question.

name: The Whole Story

name: Secret Keeper
description: Found it — you clicked the site logo far more times than anyone reasonably should.
